name: MDB Capital Holdings, LLC
business: MDB Capital Holdings, LLC is a holding company that serves as a platform for financing startups, partnering with co-founders, and fostering value creation. Its subsidiaries include Public Ventures, a registered broker-dealer focusing on microcap and small-cap financings, and PatentVest, an intellectual property service provider. The company also develops partner companies, such as MDB Minnesota One, which is working on a small molecule anti-senescence platform.
sellsTo: microcap and small cap market participants
namedSuppliers: Mayo Foundation for Medical Education and Research

exposures.sentence: MDB Minnesota One, Inc (M1), a partner company, was created in mid-2024 with the vision of developing a small molecule anti-senescence platform comprised of pharmaceutical drugs or other products to aid in longevity and to inhibit certain forms of age-related diseases.

eXoZymes Inc, (formerly Invizyme Technologies Inc.) completed its IPO on November 14, 2024, having been set up in 2019 to develop cell-free technology to optimize nature's own biological processes to make chemicals used in many common applications.

catalysts.event: eXoZymes completed its initial public offering
catalysts.sentence: On November 14, 2024, eXoZymes completed its initial public offering, in which it sold common stock, reducing MDB Capital Holdings ownership interest from approximately 60% to 47%.

catalysts.event: M1 entered into a Patent and Know-How License Agreement with Mayo
catalysts.sentence: On July 1, 2024, M1 entered into a Patent and Know-How License Agreement (the License Agreement) with the Mayo Foundation for Medical Education and Research (Mayo) for certain patent rights and associated technology pursuant to which M1 intends to develop the M1 Platform.

catalysts.event: Public Ventures began self-clearing U.S. equity securities
catalysts.sentence: In January 2024 Public Ventures began self-clearing U.S. equity securities.

catalysts.event: Company commenced a process to spin off PatentVest as a separate standalone entity
catalysts.sentence: In late 2025, the Company commenced a process to spin off PatentVest as a separate standalone entity.

tamClaims.claim: The global longevity and anti-senescence therapy market is projected to reach nearly $45 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The global longevity and anti-senescence therapy market is projected to reach nearly $45 billion by 2030.
